key_components.name: Repository<T>
key_components.description: Generic repository pattern implementation with CRUD operations, LINQ support, and change tracking

key_components.name: UnitOfWork
key_components.description: Manages database transactions across multiple repositories with commit and rollback support

key_components.name: LogService
key_components.description: NLog-based logging service with multiple log levels (Trace, Debug, Info, Error)

key_components.name: PdfGenerator
key_components.description: HTML to PDF conversion using wkhtmltopdf with file and stream input support

key_components.name: AuthorizeNetCustomerProfileService
key_components.description: Direct Authorize.Net API integration for payment processing and profile management

key_components.name: ChargeCardPaymentService
key_components.description: Credit card payment processing workflow with profile management and rollback support

key_components.name: ECheckPaymentService
key_components.description: Electronic check payment processing with on-file and one-time payment support

notes: Authorize.Net API credentials stored in database (AuthorizeNetApiMaster table)
wkhtmltopdf.exe must be installed and accessible via PATH or explicit path
Entity Framework migrations handled by ORM module
Payment processing supports both sandbox and production modes
